title: How strong is the armed forces personnel in the EU?
subtitle: In 2020, there were 1.913 million armed forces personnel in the EU member states.
textNote: Out of the 27 countries in the EU 9 have a compulsory conscription.
extraInfo_AT: In 2006 compulsory military service was reduced to six months.
extraInfo_DK: Compulsory military service lasts four to twelve months
extraInfo_EE: Compulsory military service lasts eight to eleven months
extraInfo_FI: Compulsory military service lasts six to twelve months
extraInfo_EL: Compulsory military service lasts nine to twelve months
extraInfo_LV: Compulsory military service lasts six months
extraInfo_LT: Compulsory military service lasts nine months
extraInfo_SE: Compulsory military service lasts twelve months
